title: Cobblemon- Heart of Gold and Soul of Silver
description: This is a Cobblemon Experience with some quality of life mods this has both Client and Server side mods focused around a life like feel and the Johto Pokemon series
body:
This is a Modpack with Quality of Life mods and Cobblemon focused mods such as Lithosphere, Physics mod, Falling Leaves and more this modpack for the Cobblemon Experince focusing on the Johto Regionals and bringing you a state of calm with its quality of life mods and its server and client sided mods, if there is non glitch issues and problems I will take care of thoughs Issues
(Mod you need to add your self: Ultimons)



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(For People who Played Red,Blue, Yellow and Green Only:
Quest: Why is this one Similar to Red, blue, Yellow and Green
Answer: They are actually connected parts in the show and its graphic of the insperation is slightly better than the ones for the Kanto one but still 8 bit)

</details>
